## TRM1.5. Average departure delay from all causes per flight (PI#3) {#trm1.5.-average-departure-delay-from-all-causes-per-flight-pi3 .Heading-2-TZ}

Amsterdam Schiphol is the only Dutch airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

Delay in 2025 decreased to 19.58 min/dep, 8% lower than 2024 value-- last year of RP3 -- of 21.20 min/dep.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of all causes pre-departure delay across Member States in 2025 was 16.47 min/dep.
